reasoning: The rope_v06 asset renders as a large circular ring/coil shape (approximately 90-100px diameter at 1280x720 resolution) centered in the scene. For a 'tool' category item, the spec requires 50-75% of player size (32x32 = target ~16-24px), and explicitly prohibits items larger than the player. The composited rope clearly exceeds the player footprint — it appears 3-4x larger than a 32px reference. The bright glowing white core and thick ring outline further amplify its visual mass, dominating the scene rather than sitting as a pickable diorama prop. Perspective is technically consistent (top-down flat) but the scale imbalance breaks the 'toy diorama' feel, pushing toward a 'zoomed-in' look. Fails on both the hard size cap and category proportion rule.
